channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Introduction
item.description:
Introduction

Hi this is Ashra an Information Sciences Student at Azim Premji university, Bengaluru Welcome to My Blog!

This is a blog or more like a space where I share my learning journey through the course. I’m excited to put down this course journey over this platform.

As I go through my classes, I do come across many new ideas and concepts will write about them in my own words so that I can understand and reflect them better and also share them with others.

item.title: Journey from failure to figuring
item.description: unit 3 : journey from failure to figuring The name of the unit is “reflecting on failure” which was kind of relatable ok so this unit was a little different for me it was short but helped me learn a lot . We were again divided into groups of five and were asked to read a part of a book and the book it was an amazing book for students . The book was about real incidents of failure and how people figured it out. My experience with the book reading didn’t ended up with just ending up doing the assigned task and contributing for the group .

item.title: The nature of information problem
item.description:
The second was “The nature of information problem”

In the first class we had fun with images we were given a set of code onwhich we worked upon we disscusses bsiscs of pixels , gray scale images and analysed the number we also had ‘contrast’ in our discussion using histograms we distinguised between images looking at the intensity value it was something new for me but i was ok working with it.

item.title: From Data to Wisdom
item.description:
From Data to Wisdom: My Unit 1 Reflections

For the first that took place in Tuesday evening i was really excited to know what does the course name mean “Becoming a reflective Information Scientist'.

on the first lecture we discussed what is information. I saw a few pictures which showed how important it is to represent data in a correct manner .Next we stepped on the DIKW model : data ,information ,knowledge wisdom we used a pyramid to discuss before I thought data and information are more or less the same but came to know that these are different entities.
